title: screenshot --mask: transparency outside target rects
desc: Captures union bbox of multiple grap targets, applies 40% alpha outside individual target rects. PNG output with transparency. Evidence images that highlight specific UI nodes.
steps: Capture union bbox of all grap targets (same as screenshot without --mask)
LockBits BGRA pixel walk: pixels outside all target rects get alpha*=0.4
Pixels inside any target rect stay fully opaque (alpha=255)
AllowUnsafeBlocks required for LockBits performance (50x faster than SetPixel)

requirements.expect: PNG with target areas opaque, outside 40% transparent
saves masked PNG to specified path

author: claude
